title: Water absorption confirms cool atmospheres in two little red dots
summary: Little red dots (LRDs) are an abundant population of compact high-redshift sources with red rest-frame optical continua, discovered by the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). Their red colors and power sources have been attributed either to dust reddening of standard hot accretion disks or to intrinsically cool thermal emission from dense hydrogen envelopes, in both cases surrounding accreting supermassive black holes. These scenarios predict order-of-magnitude differences in emission temperature but have lacked decisive temperature diagnostics. Here we report a prominent absorption feature at rest-frame $\sim 1.4 \, μ\mathrm{m}$ in two out of four LRDs at $z \sim 2$ with high signal-to-noise JWST spectra, among the coolest from a large LRD sample. The feature matches the shape and wavelength of the water absorption band seen in cool stars. Atmosphere models require $T \lesssim 3000\, \mathrm{K}$ to reproduce it, confirming unambiguously the presence of a cool, dense gas component contributing $20-30\%$ to the emergent continuum. A composite model reproduces both the absorption and the rest-frame optical-to-infrared continuum shape and suggests a temperature range ($\sim2000\, \mathrm{K} - 4000 \, \mathrm{K}$) rather than a single blackbody predicted by some gas envelope models. Molecular absorption demonstrates that the red continua of some LRDs are intrinsic rather than dust-reddened, implying order-of-magnitude lower bolometric luminosities and black-hole masses, and providing a new diagnostic of the emitting gas.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现高红移"小红点"天体，其红色光学连续谱来源存在争议：可能是尘埃红化的热吸积盘，或是致密氢包层的冷热辐射。本研究通过光谱中1.4μm水吸收带特征，首次明确证实了冷致密气体成分的存在。
AI.motivation: JWST发现的"小红点"天体具有红色光学连续谱，其物理机制存在两种主要解释：尘埃红化的热吸积盘模型与致密氢包层的冷热辐射模型。这两种模型预测的温度相差一个数量级，但缺乏决定性的温度诊断方法。
AI.method: 对4个z~2的LRD进行高信噪比JWST光谱观测，在其中2个样本中发现了显著的1.4μm吸收特征。通过大气模型分析该吸收特征，并与冷恒星中的水吸收带进行比对，确定发射气体的温度范围。
AI.result: 在2个LRD中检测到与冷恒星水吸收带匹配的1.4μm吸收特征。大气模型要求T≲3000K才能重现该特征，明确证实了冷致密气体成分的存在，贡献了20-30%的连续谱发射。复合模型表明温度范围为~2000-4000K，而非单一黑体辐射。
AI.conclusion: 分子吸收特征证明部分LRD的红色连续谱是固有的而非尘埃红化所致，这意味着其光度质量和黑洞质量比先前估计低一个数量级，为发射气体提供了新的诊断工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是一类丰富的致密高红移源，其静止光学连续谱呈红色，由詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）发现。它们的红色和能源被归因于标准热吸积盘的尘埃红化，或致密氢包层的固有冷热辐射，这两种情况都围绕吸积的超大质量黑洞。这些模型预测的发射温度相差一个数量级，但缺乏决定性的温度诊断。本文报告了在四个红移约2的LRD中，有两个具有高信噪比JWST光谱，在静止框架约1.4微米处出现显著的吸收特征，这是来自大样本LRD中最冷的之一。该特征与冷星中观测到的水吸收带的形状和波长匹配。大气模型需要温度不超过3000开尔文才能重现该特征，明确证实了存在一个冷的、致密的气体组分，对出射连续谱贡献20-30%。一个复合模型同时重现了吸收和静止光学到红外连续谱形状，并暗示了一个温度范围（约2000开尔文至4000开尔文），而非某些气体包层模型预测的单黑体。分子吸收证明部分LRD的红色连续谱是固有的而非尘埃红化的，这意味着其辐射光度和黑洞质量低一个数量级，并为发射气体提供了新的诊断工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：分子吸收特征证明部分LRD的红色连续谱是固有的而非尘埃红化所致，这意味着其辐射光度和黑洞质量比先前估计低一个数量级，为发射气体提供了新的诊断工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Detection of water absorption in two LRD spectra at \(2 a) The two LRD JWST/ Prism spectra with detected water absorption are plotted in blue and cyan, respectively. Black dashed lines show power-law fits to the continuum (i.e., no water absorption) to guide the eyes. Observed M dwarf spectra with varying water absorption strength are shown in yellow and brown for comparison [ 21 , 22 ] . We emphasize that these M dwarf spectra are not fits to the LRD data, but are included solely for illustrative purposes. The absorption features in LRDs are consistent with the characteristic water bands seen in these stellar spectra. To quantify the absorption in a model independent way, we define a simple continuum-normalized water absorption index based on the ratio of flux densities in two narrow rest-frame windows bracketing the break at \(1.310\,\mu{m}\) and \(1.363\,\mu{m}\) (gray vertical bands): \(r_{{H_{2}O}}=f\lambda,1.310/f\lambda,1.363-1\) (i.e., more negative values indicating stronger absorption). b) Measured water absorption strength of the LRDs (blue and cyan, shaded area indicate \(1\sigma\) uncertainties) compared to \(0.1\,{Z}_{\odot}\) Phoenix stellar models and low-density non-stellar models, across 7 orders of magnitude in densities spanning a range of temperatures. Models above \(\sim 3{,}000\,{K}\) fail to produce the observed water absorption, establishing firm evidence for the existence of low temperature, \(\sim 2{,}000\,{K}\) , gas in LRDs.

title: Growth of High-Redshift Quasars from Fermion Dark Matter Seeds
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table, accepted for publication in JHEAP
summary: Quasars hosting $\gtrsim 10^{9}\,M_\odot$ black holes at $z>6$ challenge growth scenarios that start from light seeds and assume accretion within already formed galaxies. Motivated by the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) discovery of Little Red Dots (LRDs), which suggests that $\sim 10^{6}\,M_\odot$ black holes can be active in compact, pre-galactic environments, we revisit early black hole growth with a minimal cosmology-based framework. We model the accretion history as the smaller of the Bondi inflow rate and the Eddington-limited rate, where the Bondi rate is set by the supply of overdense primordial gas whose density declines with cosmic expansion, and the Eddington rate captures regulation by radiative feedback. By fitting the observed masses and luminosities of J0313--1806 ($z=7.64$) and J0100+2802 ($z=6.30$) with Bayesian inference, we infer initial conditions that favor massive seed black holes with initial mass $M_0 \sim 10^{6}\,M_\odot$, formed at $z\sim20{-}30$ in environments with baryonic overdensity factors $f_ρ\gtrsim 50$ relative to the cosmic mean. The resulting growth histories include a prolonged supply-limited stage, and they reproduce the observed quasar masses without requiring sustained Eddington accretion or any super-Eddington episodes. The inferred seed mass scale is consistent with black holes produced by the collapse of quantum-degenerate fermion dark matter cores, providing a physically defined pathway to massive seeds at the redshifts implied by LRD phenomenology.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过贝叶斯推断拟合高红移类星体观测数据，发现需要初始质量约10^6太阳质量的大质量种子黑洞，形成于z~20-30的高密度环境中，支持量子简并费米子暗物质核坍缩形成大质量种子的物理机制。
AI.motivation: 红移z>6处存在质量≥10^9太阳质量的黑洞，这对从轻种子开始、在已形成星系内吸积的生长模型提出了挑战。JWST发现的小红点（LRDs）表明，在紧凑的预星系环境中可能存在约10^6太阳质量的黑洞活动，这促使研究者重新审视早期黑洞生长机制。
AI.method: 采用基于宇宙学的最小框架模型，将吸积历史建模为邦迪流入率和爱丁顿限制率中的较小值。邦迪率由过密原始气体供应决定（密度随宇宙膨胀下降），爱丁顿率捕捉辐射反馈的调节作用。通过贝叶斯推断拟合J0313-1806（z=7.64）和J0100+2802（z=6.30）的观测质量和光度数据。
AI.result: 推断出的初始条件倾向于初始质量M0~10^6太阳质量的大质量种子黑洞，形成于z~20-30，环境中的重子过密度因子fρ≥50（相对于宇宙平均值）。生长历史包括一个延长的供应限制阶段，无需持续的爱丁顿吸积或任何超爱丁顿过程就能再现观测到的类星体质量。
AI.conclusion: 推断的种子质量尺度与量子简并费米子暗物质核坍缩产生的黑洞一致，为LRD现象学所暗示的红移处大质量种子的形成提供了物理上明确的途径。这表明早期宇宙中可能存在不同于传统轻种子模型的黑洞形成机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在红移$z>6$处拥有$\gtrsim 10^{9}\,M_\odot$黑洞的类星体，对从轻种子开始并假设在已形成星系内吸积的增长情景提出了挑战。受詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）发现小红点（LRDs）的启发——这表明$\sim 10^{6}\,M_\odot$的黑洞可以在致密的、前星系环境中活跃——我们用一个基于宇宙学的最小框架重新审视早期黑洞增长。我们将吸积历史建模为邦迪流入速率和爱丁顿极限速率中的较小者，其中邦迪速率由过密原初气体的供应设定，其密度随宇宙膨胀而下降，而爱丁顿速率则捕捉辐射反馈的调节。通过贝叶斯推断拟合J0313–1806（$z=7.64$）和J0100+2802（$z=6.30$）的观测质量和光度，我们推断出有利于大质量种子黑洞的初始条件，其初始质量$M_0 \sim 10^{6}\,M_\odot$，形成于$z\sim20{-}30$的环境中，重子过密因子$f_ρ\gtrsim 50$相对于宇宙平均值。由此产生的增长历史包括一个延长的供应限制阶段，并且再现了观测到的类星体质量，无需持续的爱丁顿吸积或任何超爱丁顿事件。推断的种子质量尺度与量子简并费米子暗物质核坍缩产生的黑洞一致，为LRD现象学所暗示的红移处大质量种子的形成提供了物理上明确的途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：推断的种子质量尺度与量子简并费米子暗物质核坍缩产生的黑洞一致，为LRD现象学所暗示的红移处大质量种子的形成提供了物理上明确的途径。这表明早期宇宙中可能存在不同于传统轻种子模型的黑洞形成机制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Redshift evolution of the physical mass–energy density of the four standard cosmological components, computed with the Planck 2018 parameters \(H_{0}=67.4\;\text{km\,s}^{-1}\text{Mpc}^{-1}\) , \(\Omega_{{b}}=0.049\) , \(\Omega_{{m}}=0.315\) , \(\Omega_{r}=8.4\times 10^{-5}\) and \(\Omega_{\Lambda}=0.685\) . The present-day critical density is \(\rho_{{crit},0}=8.5\times 10^{-30}\,\text{g\,cm}^{-3}\) , giving \(\rho_{{b},0}=4.2\times 10^{-31}\,\text{g\,cm}^{-3}\) , \(\rho_{{m},0}=2.7\times 10^{-30}\,\text{g\,cm}^{-3}\) , \(\rho_{r,0}=7.2\times 10^{-34}\,\text{g\,cm}^{-3}\) and \(\rho_{\Lambda,0}=5.8\times 10^{-30}\,\text{g\,cm}^{-3}\) . Densities are followed from \(z=10^{4}\) to \(z=0.1\) assuming the scalings \(\rho\propto(1+z)^{3}\) for baryons and total matter, \(\rho\propto(1+z)^{4}\) for radiation, and \(\rho=\) constant for dark energy.

Figure 2: Example showing the Monte Carlo inference of initial conditions for quasar J010013.02+280225.8. growth. The posterior probability distributions of the two key parameters in our model: initial black hole mass (log \({10}(M_{0}/M_{\odot})=5.73^{+0.15}_{-0.15}\) ) at \(z=1100\) and ambient density enhancement ( \(\rho/\rho_{\text{b}}=78.88^{+32.21}_{-23.49}\) ). Upper panels show marginalized posterior distributions for each parameter. The lower left panel displays the joint probability distribution with 1- \(\sigma\) contours, revealing the degeneracy between initial mass and density, a more massive seed can grow in a less dense environment, while a lighter seed requires higher density to reach the observed final mass. The right panel shows the marginalized posterior for the density enhancement, indicating that significant overdensities ( \(>50\) times cosmic average) are required for efficient early growth.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：展示类星体J010013.02+280225.8增长的初始条件的蒙特卡洛推断示例。我们模型中两个关键参数的后验概率分布：初始黑洞质量（log \({10}(M_{0}/M_{\odot})=5.73^{+0.15}_{-0.15}\) ）在 \(z=1100\) 处，以及环境密度增强（ \(\rho/\rho_{\text{b}}=78.88^{+32.21}_{-23.49}\) ）。上方面板显示每个参数的边缘后验分布。左下方面板显示带有1- \(\sigma\) 等高线的联合概率分布，揭示了初始质量与密度之间的简并性：更重的种子可以在密度较低的环境中增长，而较轻的种子需要更高的密度才能达到观测到的最终质量。右方面板显示密度增强的边缘后验，表明有效早期增长需要显著的过密度（ \(>50\) 倍宇宙平均值）。

title: The CON-quasar stage of IRAS 07251-0248 E
comment: Accepted for publication in A&A; 9 pages. Appendix: 7 pages
summary: ALMA continuum measurements of the local ULIRG IRAS 07251-0248 E at 667$μ$m reveal an extremely compact (R < 27 pc) and bright ($T_B$ >200 K) nucleus with an absorbing foreground envelope and a surrounding (R ~ 75 pc) disk or torus seen nearly face-on. The bright and unresolved nuclear emission implies large optical depths ($τ_{667μm}$ >0.5, corresponding to $N_H > 10^{25}$ cm^-2) of hot dust at >500 K. In addition, JWST observations of the source show strong mid-infrared (mid-IR) absorption in the ro-vibrational bands of H2O nu_2=1-0 (5-7 $μ$m) and of other species including CO, HCN, C2H2, CH4, and CO2, and Herschel/PACS observations exhibit strong and saturated absorption due to OH, H2O, CH^+, and CH. We propose a model in which the unresolved ALMA submillimeter and JWST mid-IR continua trace the same nuclear source, the former penetrating deep into the nucleus and the latter probing the nuclear photosphere. The continuum model, which includes trapping of photons (the "greenhouse" effect), indicates that the nuclear ($R_h$ ~ 13 pc) luminosity and luminosity surface density are ~10$^{12}$ Lsun and $Σ_{bol}$~ 5e8 Lsun pc^-2, arising from an active galactic nucleus (AGN) so buried that high-ionization lines are completely obscured. The observed mid-IR gas-phase molecular bands probe outflowing gas with velocities of ~160 km s^-1 and are reproduced with the predicted $T_{dust}$ profile, while the far-IR molecular absorption lines are generated in the surrounding thick disk or torus with $τ_{100 μm}$~10. We conclude that IRAS 07251-0248 harbors a compact obscured nucleus (CON) that hides an AGN currently emitting at quasar luminosity. While the observed outflow could be driven by radiation pressure, we favor the scenario of a (partially) energy-conserving hot bubble caught in a very early phase of the expulsion of the highly concentrated gas at the galactic nucleus.

AI.tldr: ALMA和JWST观测揭示IRAS 07251-0248 E拥有一个极其紧凑、明亮的被遮蔽核，其中隐藏着一个类星体亮度的活动星系核，周围有厚盘或环状结构，观测到分子吸收线和外流气体。
AI.motivation: 研究本地超亮红外星系IRAS 07251-0248 E的核区结构，特别是其被高度遮蔽的活动星系核的性质，以及通过多波段观测揭示其物理条件。
AI.method: 使用ALMA在667μm进行连续谱测量，结合JWST的中红外光谱观测（5-7μm）和Herschel/PACS的远红外观测，通过多波段数据建模分析核区结构。
AI.result: 发现一个极其紧凑（R<27 pc）、明亮（T_B>200 K）的核，光学深度大（τ>0.5），核区光度约10^12 Lsun，光度面密度约5×10^8 Lsun pc^-2，观测到多种分子的中红外吸收线和外流气体（~160 km/s）。
AI.conclusion: IRAS 07251-0248 E包含一个被遮蔽的紧凑核，隐藏着一个类星体亮度的活动星系核，外流可能是辐射压驱动或能量守恒热气泡在早期阶段驱逐高度集中气体的结果。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对本地ULIRG IRAS 07251-0248 E在667 μm处的ALMA连续谱测量揭示了一个极其致密（R < 27 pc）且明亮（T_B > 200 K）的核，其周围存在一个吸收前景包层和一个近乎正面朝向的盘状或环状结构（R ~ 75 pc）。明亮且不可分辨的核发射意味着热尘埃在>500 K温度下具有大光深（τ_{667μm} >0.5，对应N_H > 10^{25} cm^{-2}）。此外，对该源的JWST观测显示，在H2O ν_2=1-0（5-7 μm）的转动振动带以及其他分子（包括CO、HCN、C2H2、CH4和CO2）中存在强中红外吸收，而Herschel/PACS观测则显示出由OH、H2O、CH^+和CH导致的强且饱和的吸收。我们提出一个模型，其中不可分辨的ALMA亚毫米连续谱和JWST中红外连续谱追踪同一个核源，前者深入穿透核内部，后者则探测核的光球层。该连续谱模型（包括光子俘获，即“温室”效应）表明，核（R_h ~ 13 pc）的光度和光度面密度分别约为10^{12} L_sun和Σ_{bol}~ 5e8 L_sun pc^{-2}，其来源是一个被深埋的活动星系核（AGN），以至于高电离谱线完全被遮蔽。观测到的中红外气相分子带探测到速度约为160 km s^{-1}的外流气体，并可通过预测的T_{dust}分布来重现，而远红外分子吸收线则产生于τ_{100 μm}~10的周围厚盘或环状结构中。我们得出结论：IRAS 07251-0248包含一个紧凑遮蔽核（CON），其中隐藏着一个目前以类星体光度辐射的AGN。虽然观测到的外流可能由辐射压驱动，但我们更倾向于认为这是一个（部分）能量守恒的热气泡，正处于驱逐星系核高度集中气体的极早期阶段。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：IRAS 07251-0248 E包含一个被遮蔽的紧凑核，隐藏着一个类星体亮度的活动星系核，外流可能是辐射压驱动或能量守恒热气泡在早期阶段驱逐高度集中气体的结果。

title: The GMRT archive atomic gas survey -- III. Comparative Study of Dark Matter Halos in Nearby Galaxies
comment: v1:18 pages, 8 figure. Comments are welcome. Accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: The distribution of dark matter in the inner regions of galaxies poses a key challenge for small-scale ΛCDM cosmology. While cold dark matter simulations predict cuspy inner density profiles, observations of low surface brightness (LSB) and dwarf galaxies often favour cored profiles, an issue known as the cusp-core problem. We investigate this problem by comparing four dark matter halo profiles: NFW (cuspy), Einasto (intermediate), Burkert (cored), and pseudo-isothermal (pISO) (cored) in a pilot sample of $11$ galaxies from the GMRT archive atomic gas survey (GARCIA). We have performed mass modelling using Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) techniques, utilising rotation curves derived from robust 3D Kinematic modelling. Baryonic contributions from stars derived using stellar kinematics based on $3.6μ\mathrm{m}$ or $r$-band photometry via Multi-Gaussian Expansion (MGE) combined with Jeans Anisotropic Model (JAM) and from gas, calculated directly from the gas surface density (HI + He) without assuming any predefined functional form, are included. Our mass modelling shows that all halo profiles provide statistically good fits, yielding consistent estimates of halo mass and stellar mass-to-light ratio. To validate our analysis, we examine the stellar-to-halo mass relation and find broad agreement with empirical models. Non-parametric density profiles derived from baryon-subtracted rotation curves show that NFW fits the inner regions best, while all profiles converge in the outskirts. Future studies with a larger sample from GARCIA will be helpful in refining this trend and addressing the cusp-core issue in greater depth.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了四种暗物质晕轮廓（NFW、Einasto、Burkert、pISO）在11个星系中的拟合情况，发现所有轮廓都能提供统计上良好的拟合，NFW在内部区域拟合最佳，所有轮廓在外围区域趋于一致。
AI.motivation: 解决ΛCDM宇宙学中的尖核问题：冷暗物质模拟预测的尖核密度轮廓与低表面亮度星系和矮星系观测到的核状轮廓之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 使用GMRT档案原子气体巡天(GARCIA)的11个星系样本，通过马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛(MCMC)技术进行质量建模。利用稳健的3D运动学建模推导旋转曲线，包括来自恒星（基于3.6μm或r波段光度测量通过多高斯展开和Jeans各向异性模型）和气体（直接从气体表面密度计算）的重子贡献。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系内部区域暗物质的分布对小尺度ΛCDM宇宙学构成了关键挑战。虽然冷暗物质模拟预测了尖点状的内禀密度轮廓，但对低表面亮度（LSB）星系和矮星系的观测往往更支持核状轮廓，这一问题被称为尖核问题。我们通过在一个来自GMRT档案原子气体巡天（GARCIA）的试点样本（包含11个星系）中比较四种暗物质晕轮廓：NFW（尖点状）、Einasto（中间型）、Burkert（核状）和伪等温（pISO）（核状）来研究这一问题。我们利用基于稳健的三维运动学模型导出的旋转曲线，采用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）技术进行了质量建模。模型中包含了来自恒星的重子贡献（基于3.6μm或r波段测光，通过多高斯展开（MGE）结合金斯各向异性模型（JAM）的恒星运动学导出）以及来自气体的贡献（直接根据气体面密度（HI + He）计算，未假设任何预定义函数形式）。我们的质量建模显示，所有晕轮廓均能提供统计上良好的拟合，并给出晕质量和恒星质光比的一致估计。为验证分析，我们检验了恒星-晕质量关系，发现与经验模型大致吻合。由重子扣除后的旋转曲线导出的非参数密度轮廓表明，NFW在内部区域拟合最佳，而所有轮廓在外围区域趋于一致。未来利用GARCIA更大样本的研究将有助于完善这一趋势并更深入地解决尖核问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，研究结果表明所有暗物质晕轮廓都能提供可接受的拟合，NFW在星系内部区域表现最佳。未来使用更大GARCIA样本的研究将有助于进一步验证这一趋势并更深入地解决尖核问题。

title: B-field Orion Protostellar Survey (BOPS). IV: The Relative Orientation Between Magnetic Fields and Density Structures in Young Protostellar Envelopes
comment: 16 pages, 5 figure, 1 table, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: We investigate the relative alignment between density structures and magnetic fields in eight young protostars from the ALMA B-field Orion Protostellar Survey. Column density maps are derived from 870 $μ$m dust continuum emission, and the Histogram of Relative Orientations (HRO) method is applied to quantify the correlation between magnetic field orientations and density structures on envelope scales ($\sim$10$^{3}$~au). We find that the relative alignment shows overall weak evidence of systematic evolution with column density, suggesting that column density alone does not fully determine the alignment. The magnetization level also plays a crucial role, with weakly magnetized envelopes exhibiting predominantly parallel or random alignment, whereas strongly magnetized ones show perpendicular configurations even at moderate densities. These results reveal that density and magnetization jointly shape the morphology of protostellar envelopes and the coupling between gravity and magnetic fields during early stages of star formation.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用ALMA B场猎户座原恒星巡天数据，研究了八个年轻原恒星中密度结构与磁场之间的相对取向。柱密度图由870 μm尘埃连续谱辐射导出，并应用相对取向直方图方法量化包层尺度（约10^3 au）上磁场方向与密度结构之间的相关性。我们发现相对取向整体上随柱密度演化的证据较弱，表明柱密度本身并不能完全决定取向。磁化水平也起着关键作用：弱磁化包层主要表现为平行或随机取向，而强磁化包层即使在中等密度下也呈现垂直构型。这些结果表明，密度和磁化水平共同塑造原恒星包层的形态，以及恒星形成早期阶段重力与磁场之间的耦合关系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：密度和磁化水平共同塑造原恒星包层的形态，以及在恒星形成早期阶段重力与磁场的耦合关系。

title: Differentiable Stochastic Halo Occupation Distribution with Galaxy Intrinsic Alignments
summary: We present diffHOD-IA, a fully differentiable implementation of a halo occupation distribution (HOD) model that incorporates galaxy intrinsic alignments (IA). Motivated by the diffHOD framework, we create a new implementation that extends differentiable galaxy population modeling to include orientation-dependent statistics crucial for weak gravitational lensing analyses. Our implementation combines this HOD formulation with an IA model, enabling end-to-end automatic differentiation from HOD and IA parameters through to the galaxy field. We additionally extend this framework to differentiably model two-point correlation functions, including galaxy clustering and IA statistics. We validate diffHOD-IA against the reference halotools-IA implementation using the Bolshoi-Planck simulation, demonstrating excellent agreement across both one-point and two-point statistics. We verify the accuracy of gradients computed via automatic differentiation by comparison with finite-difference estimates for both HOD and IA parameters. We present science use cases leveraging gradients in the simulations to recover the IA parameters of a galaxy field representative of the TNG300 simulation. Finally, we apply diffHOD-IA in a Hamiltonian Monte Carlo analysis and compare its performance with halotools-IA and a neural-network-based emulator, IAEmu. Unlike emulator-based approaches, diffHOD-IA provides differentiability at the catalog level, enabling integration into field-level inference pipelines and extension to arbitrary summary statistics for next-generation weak-lensing analyses. Our code is publicly available.

AI.tldr: diffHOD-IA是一个完全可微分的晕族占据分布模型，结合了星系内禀排列效应，支持从参数到星系场的端到端自动微分，为下一代弱引力透镜分析提供场级推断能力。
AI.motivation: 现有HOD模型缺乏对星系内禀排列效应的可微分建模能力，而IA对弱引力透镜分析至关重要。需要开发一个能够端到端自动微分、支持场级推断的框架，以替代基于模拟器的传统方法。
AI.method: 基于diffHOD框架扩展，结合HOD模型和IA模型，实现从HOD和IA参数到星系场的完全可微分建模。扩展框架以可微分方式计算两点相关函数，包括星系聚类和IA统计量。使用自动微分计算梯度，并与有限差分估计进行验证。
AI.result: 在Bolshoi-Planck模拟中验证了与halotools-IA参考实现的一致性，在一阶和二阶统计量上表现优异。自动微分计算的梯度与有限差分估计吻合。成功恢复TNG300模拟代表性星系场的IA参数。在哈密顿蒙特卡洛分析中表现出色，优于传统模拟器方法。
AI.conclusion: diffHOD-IA提供了星系目录级别的可微分性，能够集成到场级推断流程中，并扩展到任意汇总统计量，为下一代弱透镜分析提供了比传统模拟器方法更灵活强大的工具。代码已公开可用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了diffHOD-IA，一种完全可微分的晕占据分布（HOD）模型实现，该模型包含了星系内禀排列（IA）。受diffHOD框架的启发，我们创建了一个新的实现，将可微分的星系布居建模扩展到包含对弱引力透镜分析至关重要的方向相关统计量。我们的实现将该HOD公式与IA模型相结合，实现了从HOD和IA参数到星系场的端到端自动微分。此外，我们将该框架扩展到可微分地建模两点相关函数，包括星系成团性和IA统计量。我们使用Bolshoi-Planck模拟验证了diffHOD-IA与参考halotools-IA实现的一致性，在单点和两点统计量上均表现出极好的一致性。我们通过比较自动微分计算的梯度与HOD和IA参数的有限差分估计，验证了梯度的准确性。我们展示了利用模拟中梯度恢复代表TNG300模拟的星系场的IA参数的科学用例。最后，我们在哈密顿蒙特卡洛分析中应用diffHOD-IA，并将其性能与halotools-IA和基于神经网络的模拟器IAEmu进行比较。与基于模拟器的方法不同，diffHOD-IA在星表级别提供可微分性，使其能够集成到场级推断流程中，并扩展到下一代弱透镜分析的任意汇总统计量。我们的代码已公开可用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，diffHOD-IA提供了星系目录级别的可微分性，能够集成到场级推断流程中，并扩展到任意汇总统计量，为下一代弱透镜分析提供了比传统模拟器方法更灵活强大的工具。代码已公开可用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Validation of diffHOD-IA against the reference halotools-IA implementation for the tng300 fiducial HOD. Top left and center: Projected galaxy density fields across the simulation volume along the line of sight. Both implementations produce visually indistinguishable large-scale structure. Top right: Distribution of galaxy number counts \(N_{\text{gal}}\) across 100 realizations using identical random seeds. Both implementations produce consistent galaxy number densities with similar scatter. Bottom left: Galaxy position-position correlation function \(\xi(r)\) averaged over 100 realizations, with error bars indicating the standard deviation across realizations. The two implementations show excellent agreement across all scales. Bottom center and right: Galaxy position-orientation correlation function \(\omega(r)\) and orientation-orientation correlation function \(\eta(r)\) . These correlations show strong agreement between the two implementations across all scales. \(\eta(r)\) exhibits larger statistical noise and error bars due to the effects of galaxy shape noise. Despite the noise, the two implementations remain consistent within uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：针对tng300基准HOD，diffHOD-IA与参考halotools-IA实现的验证。左上和左中：沿视线方向模拟体积上的投影星系密度场。两种实现产生视觉上无法区分的大尺度结构。右上：使用相同随机种子在100次实现中星系计数\(N_{\text{gal}}\)的分布。两种实现产生一致的星系数密度，具有相似的离散度。左下：100次实现平均的星系位置-位置相关函数\(\xi(r)\)，误差棒表示实现间的标准差。两种实现在所有尺度上表现出极好的一致性。左中和右中：星系位置-取向相关函数\(\omega(r)\)和取向-取向相关函数\(\eta(r)\)。这些相关性在两种实现之间在所有尺度上显示出强一致性。由于星系形状噪声的影响，\(\eta(r)\)表现出更大的统计噪声和误差棒。尽管存在噪声，两种实现在不确定性范围内仍然一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Gradients of the halo occupation distribution functions with respect to HOD parameters as a function of halo mass. Left panel: Gradients of the mean central galaxy occupation \(\langle N_{cen}\rangle\) with respect to \(\log M_{min}\) (blue) and \(\sigma_{\log M}\) (orange). The gradients are largest in the transition region around \(\log_{10}M/M_{\odot}\approx 12\) where the occupation probability transitions from 0 to 1, and vanish at high masses where \(\langle N_{cen}\rangle\) saturates to unity. Right panel: Gradients of the mean satellite galaxy occupation \(\langle N_{sat}\rangle\) with respect to all five HOD parameters: \(\log M_{min}\) , \(\sigma_{\log M}\) , \(\log M_{0}\) , \(\log M_{1}\) , and \(\alpha\) . In both panels, solid lines show gradients computed via automatic differentiation and dotted points show finite difference estimates, demonstrating excellent agreement. The IA parameters \(\mu_{\text{cen}}\) and \(\mu_{\text{sat}}\) do not affect galaxy number counts and have zero gradient everywhere. These gradients enable efficient gradient-based inference of HOD parameters from galaxy clustering observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：晕占据分布函数相对于HOD参数的梯度作为晕质量的函数。左图：平均中央星系占据\(\langle N_{cen}\rangle\)相对于\(\log M_{min}\)（蓝色）和\(\sigma_{\log M}\)（橙色）的梯度。梯度在占据概率从0过渡到1的过渡区域\(\log_{10}M/M_{\odot}\approx 12\)附近最大，并在高质量处消失，此时\(\langle N_{cen}\rangle\)饱和为1。右图：平均卫星星系占据\(\langle N_{sat}\rangle\)相对于所有五个HOD参数：\(\log M_{min}\)、\(\sigma_{\log M}\)、\(\log M_{0}\)、\(\log M_{1}\)和\(\alpha\)的梯度。在两个图中，实线显示通过自动微分计算的梯度，点线显示有限差分估计，表现出极好的一致性。IA参数\(\mu_{\text{cen}}\)和\(\mu_{\text{sat}}\)不影响星系计数，梯度处处为零。这些梯度使得能够从星系成团性观测中高效地进行基于梯度的HOD参数推断。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Validation of differentiable sampling from the Dimroth–Watson distribution for galaxy-halo misalignment angles. Left panel: Probability distribution \(P(\cos\theta)\) of misalignment angles for varying alignment strength \(\mu\) . The top axes show the corresponding misalignment angle \(\theta\) in degrees. Solid lines show histograms from samples drawn using our differentiable inverse-CDF sampler; dashed lines show the analytic Dimroth–Watson PDF. The close agreement validates the differentiable sampling implementation. Positive \(\mu\) (magenta) produces alignment with probability concentrated at \(\cos\theta=\pm 1\) , while negative \(\mu\) (cyan) produces anti-alignment peaked at \(\cos\theta=0\) . Right panel: Gradient of the probability distribution with respect to the alignment parameter, \(\partial P/\partial\mu\) . Dashed lines show analytic gradients derived from the PDF formula; scatter points show finite-difference gradients of the analytic Dimroth–Watson PDF; solid lines show gradients computed via automatic differentiation through the sampling procedure, where a Gaussian kernel density estimate is used to obtain a smooth density from discrete samples.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：星系-晕错位角的Dimroth–Watson分布的可微分采样验证。左图：不同对齐强度\(\mu\)下错位角的概率分布\(P(\cos\theta)\)。顶部坐标轴显示以度为单位的相应错位角\(\theta\)。实线显示使用我们的可微分逆CDF采样器抽取的样本直方图；虚线显示解析的Dimroth–Watson概率密度函数。紧密的一致性验证了可微分采样的实现。正\(\mu\)（品红色）产生对齐，概率集中在\(\cos\theta=\pm 1\)，而负\(\mu\)（青色）产生反对齐，峰值在\(\cos\theta=0\)。右图：概率分布相对于对齐参数的梯度\(\partial P/\partial\mu\)。虚线显示从概率密度函数公式导出的解析梯度；散点显示解析Dimroth–Watson概率密度函数的有限差分梯度；实线显示通过采样过程的自动微分计算的梯度，其中使用高斯核密度估计从离散样本获得平滑密度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Gradient-based recovery of IA parameters from 50 random initializations using moment-matching optimization. The target parameters ( \(\mu_{cen}=0.7905\) , \(\mu_{sat}=0.307\) , pink star) represent the best-fit \(\mu\) values to the tng300 HOD configuration, with uncertainty contours in pink estimated from the scatter in effective \(\mu\) values recovered by matching \(\langle t^{2}\rangle\) to the theoretical Dimroth–Watson expectation across 50 independent HOD realizations. Optimization trajectories are shown as gray lines connecting initial positions to converged solutions. Gray circles denote optimizations using a single HOD realization seed per gradient step, while green squares show results when averaging over three seeds. The inset panel (lower left) shows a zoomed view of the convergence region, revealing tight clustering of final parameter estimates around the true values. Both single-seed and three-seed strategies successfully recover the target parameters across diverse initializations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用矩匹配优化从50个随机初始化中基于梯度恢复IA参数。目标参数（\(\mu_{cen}=0.7905\)，\(\mu_{sat}=0.307\)，粉色星形）代表tng300 HOD配置的最佳拟合\(\mu\)值，粉色不确定性等高线通过匹配\(\langle t^{2}\rangle\)到50个独立HOD实现中恢复的有效\(\mu\)值的离散度估计。优化轨迹显示为连接初始位置到收敛解的灰色线。灰色圆圈表示每次梯度步骤使用单个HOD实现种子的优化，而绿色方块显示平均三个种子时的结果。插图面板（左下）显示收敛区域的放大视图，揭示最终参数估计紧密聚集在真实值周围。单种子和三种子策略均成功地从不同初始化中恢复目标参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Gradient-based recovery of IA parameters from 50 random initializations using correlation function matching optimization. The target parameters ( \(\mu_{cen}=0.79\) , \(\mu_{sat}=0.30\) , pink star) represent the fiducial tng300 HOD configuration, with \(1\sigma\) and \(2\sigma\) uncertainty regions estimated from the scatter of maximum-likelihood fits across 50 independent HOD realizations shown in pink. Optimization trajectories are shown as gray lines connecting initial positions to converged solutions. Gray circles denote converged values. The inset panel (lower left) shows a zoomed view of the convergence region, revealing tight clustering of final parameter estimates around the true values.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：使用相关函数匹配优化从50个随机初始化中基于梯度恢复IA参数。目标参数（\(\mu_{cen}=0.79\)，\(\mu_{sat}=0.30\)，粉色星形）代表基准tng300 HOD配置，\(1\sigma\)和\(2\sigma\)不确定性区域通过50个独立HOD实现中最大似然拟合的离散度估计，以粉色显示。优化轨迹显示为连接初始位置到收敛解的灰色线。灰色圆圈表示收敛值。插图面板（左下）显示收敛区域的放大视图，揭示最终参数估计紧密聚集在真实值周围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : \(\mu_{\text{cen}}\) and \(\mu_{\text{sat}}\) posteriors for the fiducial tng300 catalog derived using diffHOD-IA with HMC (blue), IAEmu with HMC (orange), and halotools-IA with MCMC (green). diffHOD-IA is in excellent agreement with halotools-IA , while exhibiting substantially faster inference. Exact posterior values are given in Table 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用diffHOD-IA与HMC（蓝色）、IAEmu与HMC（橙色）以及halotools-IA与MCMC（绿色）推导的基准tng300星表的\(\mu_{\text{cen}}\)和\(\mu_{\text{sat}}\)后验分布。diffHOD-IA与halotools-IA表现出极好的一致性，同时推断速度显著更快。精确后验值见表2。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Comparison of \(\mu_{\text{cen}}\) and \(\mu_{\text{sat}}\) posteriors from the Monte Carlo experiments. diffHOD-IA and IAEmu posteriors used HMC, while halotools-IA posteriors used MCMC.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：蒙特卡洛实验中\(\mu_{\text{cen}}\)和\(\mu_{\text{sat}}\)后验的比较。diffHOD-IA和IAEmu后验使用HMC，而halotools-IA后验使用MCMC。

title: Microlensing constraint on Primordial Black Hole abundance with Subaru Hyper Suprime-Cam observations of Andromeda
summary: We present updated microlensing analysis results based on high-cadence ($\sim$2~min) Subaru Hyper Suprime-Cam (HSC) observations of the Andromeda Galaxy (M31) in 2014, 2017, and 2020, yielding a total of 39.3 hours of data. We use a point-lens finite-source model for the microlensing light curve model and employ multi-stage selection procedures to identify microlensing candidates. From more than 25,000 variable candidates detected across all nights, we identify 12 microlensing candidates with light-curve timescales shorter than 5~hours, and among them, 4 secure candidates with high-significance detections. We estimate detection efficiencies using light-curve-level simulations that account for observational conditions and finite-source effects. Using a hierarchical Bayesian framework that combines the light-curve fitting information for each candidate with the Poisson statistics of the number of candidates, we derive constraints on parameters that characterize the abundance and mass scale of primordial black hole (PBH) dark matter. First, we derive upper limits on the PBH abundance under the null hypothesis that all events are assumed to be false detections. Next, employing the PBH hypothesis in which all (or only secure) candidates are assumed to be due to PBH microlensing, we derive the allowed region of the PBH parameters; the inferred mass scale is $M_{\rm PBH}\sim10^{-7}$--$10^{-6}M_\odot$, and the PBH abundance to the total dark matter is $f_{\rm PBH}\sim \mathcal{O}(10^{-2}{\rm -}10^{-1})$. Our results demonstrate that HSC-M31 monitoring remains a uniquely powerful probe of PBHs, and highlight the need for further studies for example, using Rubin Observatory LSST observations of the Large Magellanic Cloud.

AI.tldr: 基于高频率（约2分钟）Subaru HSC对M31的观测，识别出12个微引力透镜候选体，其中4个为可靠候选体，用于约束原初黑洞暗物质的丰度和质量尺度。
AI.motivation: 通过监测仙女座星系（M31）的微引力透镜事件，探测原初黑洞（PBH）作为暗物质候选体的存在，约束其丰度和质量分布。
AI.method: 使用点透镜有限源模型分析微引力透镜光变曲线，采用多阶段选择程序从超过25,000个变量候选体中筛选；通过光变曲线级模拟估计探测效率；采用分层贝叶斯框架结合光变曲线拟合信息和泊松统计推导PBH参数约束。
AI.result: 识别出12个时标短于5小时的微引力透镜候选体，其中4个为可靠候选体；在零假设下推导PBH丰度上限；在PBH假设下推断质量尺度为10^{-7}至10^{-6}太阳质量，丰度为暗物质总量的10^{-2}至10^{-1}量级。
AI.conclusion: HSC-M31监测仍然是探测PBH的独特有力工具，未来需要进一步研究，如利用Rubin天文台LSST对大型麦哲伦云的观测。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于2014年、2017年和2020年对仙女座星系（M31）的高频次（约2分钟）斯巴鲁超广角主焦点相机（HSC）观测，展示了更新的微引力透镜分析结果，总观测时长为39.3小时。我们采用点源有限源模型作为微引力透镜光变曲线模型，并运用多阶段筛选程序来识别微引力透镜候选体。从所有夜晚探测到的超过25,000个变源候选体中，我们识别出12个光变曲线时标短于5小时的微引力透镜候选体，其中4个为具有高显著性探测的可靠候选体。我们通过考虑观测条件和有限源效应的光变曲线级模拟来估计探测效率。利用结合每个候选体光变曲线拟合信息与候选体数量的泊松统计的分层贝叶斯框架，我们推导出表征原初黑洞（PBH）暗物质丰度和质量尺度的参数约束。首先，在原假设（所有事件均视为假探测）下，我们推导出PBH丰度的上限。其次，在PBH假设（所有或仅可靠候选体均归因于PBH微引力透镜）下，我们推导出PBH参数的允许区域；推断的质量尺度为$M_{\rm PBH}\sim10^{-7}$--$10^{-6}M_\odot$，PBH占全部暗物质的丰度为$f_{\rm PBH}\sim \mathcal{O}(10^{-2}{\rm -}10^{-1})$。我们的结果表明，HSC-M31监测仍然是探测PBH的独特有力工具，并强调了进一步研究的必要性，例如利用鲁宾天文台LSST对大型麦哲伦云的观测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：HSC-M31监测仍然是探测PBH的独特有力工具，未来需要进一步研究，如利用鲁宾天文台LSST对大型麦哲伦云的观测。
